global.description: The ad features a clean, modern design with abstract shapes and clear text elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to save money with a reward offer.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: A collection of geometric shapes including a large rectangle and a circle, rendered in a light green color.

elements.label: Overlay shapes
elements.description: An overlay of a smaller rectangle and circle, slightly darker than the background, creating a layered effect.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small, solid circle positioned towards the bottom of the ad, contributing to the abstract design.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold, black text stating 'Save with confidence' with a smaller tagline below it, set against a light green background.
elements.text_content: Save with confidence Built for peace of mind

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The brand name 'ClearLedger' displayed prominently at the top in a bold, modern font.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A bright button with the text 'Claim reward' in white, set against a darker green background, positioned at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist with vibrant colors, ClearLedger, reward offer
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main message is centered, and the call to action is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Save with confidence, Built for peace of mind, ClearLedger, €9.99, Claim reward
